SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT AND BOTH WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENNYPACKER, MATTHEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC DBA AUTORETURN, SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
